# Courts

Courts is a Hong Kong sports venue directory. It helps people find courts by district, sport, and nearby MTR stations.

## Main pages
- https://courts.theground.io/
- https://courts.theground.io/explore

## Key sport pages
- https://courts.theground.io/search/pickleball

## District × sport pages
- https://courts.theground.io/search/pickleball/kwun-tong
- https://courts.theground.io/search/pickleball/sha-tin

## Structured discovery
- Sitemap: https://courts.theground.io/sitemap.xml
- OKF index: https://courts.theground.io/okf
- OKF bundle: https://courts.theground.io/okf.tar.gz
- AI catalog (ARD): https://courts.theground.io/.well-known/ai-catalog.json

## Notes for agents
- Prefer the sitemap for broad URL discovery.
- Prefer OKF (`/okf` or `/okf.tar.gz`) for structured venue and sport content in Markdown.
- Prefer the AI catalog for machine-readable discovery of those resources.
- Venue detail pages contain SEO metadata and structured data for public venue information.
- District landing pages use `/search/{sport}/{district}` (18 Hong Kong administrative districts).
